Rythmos® Kallos Wearable

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Real-Time Location
Fall Monitoring
Nurse Call Button
Wander Management
Access Control

Overview

Rythmos® Kallos Wearable is a smartwatch-style resident wearable delivers real-time indoor location tracking, automatic fall monitoring, integrated nurse call, 2-way audio communication, and wander management.

FUNCTIONS

Resident Safety Tracking
Provides instant caregiver notification
2-way communication with caregiver

Key Capabilities

Real-Time
Location

Indoor
& outdoor

Nurse
Call

One-press
alert

Fall
Monitoring

ML-based
detection

Wander
Management

Zone-based
alerts

Access
Control

Proximity
unlock

2-Way
Comms

VoLTE
communication

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 45 x 38 x 12 mm
Display: Color touchscreen
Battery Life: Up to 1 month usage dependent
Water Resistance: IP67 Waterproof and shower safe
Feedback: Haptic and Visual LED indicators
Indoor Positioning: Rythmos Mesh Network with 3 m accuracy
Communication: 2-way staff resident
Power Source: Rechargeable battery
Buttons: Force touch display and Side button
Charge Time: Approximately 2 hours from 0 to 100 percent
Wear Styles: Wrist or neck worn
Mesh Network Protocol: Rythmos Mesh Network Wirepas 2.4 GHz based
Outdoor Positioning: GPS-LTE
Firmware Updates: Over-the-air OTA

System Topology — Kallos Wearable Deployment

Standard wrist band included. Adjustable to fit most wrist sizes. Available in multiple colours. Suitable for daily wear including showering

Lanyard attachment allows the Kallos to be worn around the neck. Ideal for residents who prefer not to wear a wrist band.

The Kallos integrates with the full Rythmos® ecosystem — Access + Wander Readers, Anchor mesh network, Gateway, and Care Manager — for centralized resident monitoring.

Installation Guidelines

Standard Wrist Band

Adjustable band available in multiple colors; suitable for daily wear and showering.

Neck / Lanyard Wear

Ideal for residents who prefer not to wear a wrist band

Secure Locking Band (Optional)

Difficult-to-remove design for at-risk residents; includes a magnetic key

Rechargeable

Internal battery with no replacement required.

Zero On-site Servicing

All software updates are managed remotely via the portal.

Cleaning

Device is fully safe for bath, spa, and disinfection protocols

intrexis.com
